# CANDIDATE: SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK_VOL_MULT_1_3_KEEPER

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** parameter optimization  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK trigger with vol_mult=1.3 captures extended volatility breakouts while avoiding false breaks via body_min_cents and min_stars filters. The edge exists because genuine institutional breakouts show sustained volume expansion beyond average, filtered by minimum candle body size and ★★+ level confirmation to reduce noise.

## Mechanism

Entry triggers when: (1) SPY breaks a ★★+ named level with close beyond level, (2) 5m bar volume >= vol_mult * 20-bar average volume, (3) candle body size >= body_min_cents, (4) min_stars >= 2 (confirming confluence with multi-day structure). Exit: premium stop at -8%, TP1 at +40% of premium (sell 66.7% qty), runner target at +150% with trailing stop activated after TP1 (stop offset = +5% from arm). Requires break above open to avoid gap-down false signals.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=10 requires ~$8.9K+ account (scaling from qty=28 requiring $25K+; $1K paper realizes ~14% of headline P&L).
2. **Sample bias:** 5 keepers found from unspecified sweep size; high overfit risk due to multiple parameter comparisons without walk-forward validation.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (no walk-forward held-out window tested).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (no realistic OPRA fill simulation on top 3 J days).
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: 5/01 (0 capture vs +470 J winner); max drawdown: unknown without equity curve; blow-up scenario: sustained low-vol regime causing frequent false breaks and premium stop losses.
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires analysis; top-5 days likely dominate wide_pnl given extreme value ($24,696 over 208 trades).

2 / 10 -- edge_capture below OP-16 rejection floor; high overfit risk from unswept parameter space; no OOS/real-fills validation.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing candidates (all are watcher/gate types or V14e/SNIPER variants with different triggers). Complements SNIPER_VIX_TREND_STAGE2_ENTRY_SWEEP by testing vol_mult=1.3 vs its vol_mult=0.9 optimum, but fails OP-16 gate due to poor J-day capture. Not suitable for leaderboard promotion until edge_capture >771 demonstrated.
